message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): '__seqcount_init' sets signal field 'seqcount.sequence', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=seqcount;field=sequence;offset=0] [oracle:assert=seqcount.sequence stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets sequence without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
